posts.author: edarling85 (Wild 6 | Eric Darling)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Monday.com team,

Can we PLEASE get the Workflow Center feature added back to Pro accounts. It is such a great feature and most of my clients have a workflow that benefits from this feature greatly. They are typically small business that do not have an “enterprise level” budget. I know this was something that was rolled out as a “beta” program in Pro and Enterprise accounts. I had a few clients that had access to it at the Pro level and it was great for them as a small business. Who can I talk to about this?
